a:r.a:t: Service Value Chain & Operating Framework, mapping OKRs to ITIL Standards
Incident Management, Service Request Fulfillment, First Contact Resolution Rate
Problem Management, Root Cause Analysis, Knowledge Management & Enablement
IT Asset Management, Change & Release Management, New Store Deployment
Project Delivery, Service Level Management, Resource Optimization
Supplier Performance, Financial Management, Compliance & Risk Control
Knowledge Cycle, Collaboration Metrics, Value Co-creation
Measurement System, Reporting Mechanism, Data-Driven Culture
